title: Meme Coins News: Pepeto Presale Passes $10.28 Million as the Solana Price Prediction Targets $600 While SOL Tokens Collapse
author: Not Specified
description: Pepeto's presale has raised $10.28 million, attracting large crypto wallets. Meanwhile, Solana (SOL) has declined 75% from its all-time high to $73, with token launches dropping 42% since mid-January. Despite bullish long-term tech developments like Firedancer and Alpenglow, investor attention is shifting from Solana tokens to Ethereum-based projects. Solana price predictions range from $250-$600 depending on the analyst.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Standard Chartered maintains a measured Solana price prediction of $250 for 2026 and $2,000 by 2030, suggesting cautious optimism about long-term prospects despite near-term challenges.
CME Group extended 24/7 SOL derivatives trading in June, indicating institutional support and increased accessibility for trading Solana, which is a bullish signal for market infrastructure.

title: Small Caps Near Record Highs, Robinhood Rallies 12%: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: U.S. stocks traded higher midday Wednesday with semiconductor equipment names and small caps leading gains ahead of Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first interest-rate decision. The Russell 2000 jumped 1.2% to a record high. Applied Materials surged 7% after Citi raised its price target, while Robinhood rallied 12.2% on strong trading volumes. Exchange operators fell sharply after Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval raised competitive concerns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Surged 7% after Citi raised price target to $710 from $550 and reiterated Buy rating, citing durable AI-driven demand for wafer-fab equipment
Jumped 12.2% after Deutsche Bank raised price target to $105 from $98, citing record June trading volumes and workforce optimization
Surged 13.3% on reports that OpenAI is evaluating capacity at the company's Project Matador AI power campus with potential for major commercial agreement
Dropped 5.8% after analysts flagged Kalshi's approval to offer Bitcoin perpetual futures as a competitive threat to incumbent venues
Fell 4.4% due to competitive concerns from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval affecting exchange operators
Dropped 7.6% as peer exchange operators were hammered by competitive threats from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval
Fell 7.0% despite beating earnings expectations, as profit slipped year-over-year from $1.38 to $1.31 adjusted EPS

title: Kevin Warsh May Throw President Donald Trump Under the Bus in His First FOMC Meeting as Fed Chair
author: Sean Williams
description: New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh holds his first FOMC meeting on June 17, 2026, as U.S. inflation hits a three-year high of 4.2% in May. The article suggests Warsh will likely blame President Trump's tariff and Iran policies for elevated inflation, similar to his predecessor Jerome Powell. The FOMC is expected to shift from an easing bias to a neutral stance, with growing market expectations for potential rate hikes by year-end, which poses challenges for the historically expensive stock market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Increased volatility and uncertainty around interest rate expectations typically benefit derivatives and futures trading platforms.

title: In 6 Words, Fed Governor Lisa Cook Issued a Stark Warning to Wall Street
author: Katie Brockman
description: Fed Governor Lisa Cook warned that interest rate increases are on the table as inflation continues to surge, reaching a three-year high of 4.2%. While the labor market remains resilient, the Fed is shifting focus toward controlling inflation. The CME FedWatch Tool estimates a 58% probability of a rate hike by December, which could dampen market gains as borrowing costs increase.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only as the provider of the FedWatch Tool used to estimate rate hike probabilities; no direct impact from the Fed's policy decisions.

title: Wow! The Probability of an Interest Rate Hike in 2026 Has Soared Over the Past Week.
author: Sean Williams
description: U.S. inflation jumped to a 4.2% three-year high in May, causing the CME FedWatch Tool to show a 71% probability of an interest rate hike by December 2026, up from below 50% just days earlier. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's historically hawkish stance makes rate hikes more likely, which could pressure expensive stock valuations and force businesses to cut back on AI infrastructure spending.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: CME Group's FedWatch Tool is referenced as a key predictive instrument for rate hike probabilities, but the company itself is neither positively nor negatively impacted by the rate hike scenario discussed.
